sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in sources

special_mechanics.name: Pole Rotation
special_mechanics.description: Main gameplay mechanic where Bubbles (balloonfish protagonist) moves around mazes by grabbing onto Turning Posts to change direction and spin 'around and around'

special_mechanics.name: Sound Wave Stun
special_mechanics.description: Ability to stun Unira enemies using a sound wave attack

special_mechanics.name: Enemy Push Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: When stunned, Unira can be pushed into walls to eliminate them and gain points

special_mechanics.name: Ingot Reveal System
special_mechanics.description: Ingots must be passed over an odd number of times to uncover them; they alternate between uncovered and dull sides

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative/empirical data only. No numerical physics parameters are documented in available sources. Game is puzzle-focused rather than action-focused, emphasizing maze navigation and turning mechanics via poles rather than traditional platforming physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Clu Clu Land (NES)
